content.en:
"The Protoss is in trouble!"

Ye Tian got up and went out of the customs, preparing to go to the Protoss.

Although he didn't like the Protoss very much, after all, he signed a contract with the First God Lord of the Protoss, promising to take action once when the Protoss encountered a crisis, and once the attack was over, he would no longer help the Protoss.

It stands to reason that in an ordinary crisis, the Protoss will not use this opportunity, but now the First Divine Lord has sent a message for help, obviously the Protoss is facing the crisis of extinction, and with the strength of the First Divine Lord, it will not be able to get through.

Swish!

Ye Tian used his constant light supernatural power, pierced through the void at an incredible speed, and quickly went to the territory of the Protoss.

......

Protoss.

The First Divine Lord was trapped in the Divine Realm at this time, and activated countless divine arrays with many Supreme Beings of the Divine Race, Heavenly Venerables, and a large number of Lords to resist the invasion of the enemy.

Outside the God Realm, a strong man wearing silver gray armor was bombarding the formation of the God Realm, and in various parts of the God Clan, there were also a large number of strong people fighting with the strong men of the God Clan.

On the whole, the Protoss still has an advantage, after all, the number of those strong people is too small to be comparable to the Protoss, but at the top level, the Protoss is too weak to compete with these strong people at all.

For example, if the First Divine Master, if it weren't for the formation of the God Realm, I am afraid that he would have fallen and died.

But once the divine realm is broken, the destruction of the divine race is an inevitable result.

"First Divine Lord, surrender to our Xulong Holy Land, and we can spare your lives!"

An Earth Venerable-level powerhouse with a spear in his hand said coldly.

He is the ten-star Earth Venerable of the Cangyu Universe Xulong Holy Land - Earth Splitting Spear Venerable!

Moreover, he is not an ordinary ten-star earth venerable, but he is at the top level among the ten star earth venerables, and he is enough to rank among the top five in the Xulong Holy Land.

And this time, in order to destroy the Protoss, the Xulong Holy Land sent three ten-star Earth Lords and more than a hundred six-star Earth Lords, plus a large number of Holy Land disciples, and the mere God Clan couldn't compete at all.

"Earth Splitting Spear Venerable, we also have god-level powerhouses in the Eternal Universe, do you Cangyu Universe really want to go to war?"

The First Divine Lord roared.

"Hahaha!!" Earth Splitting Spear Venerable sneered: "We have long known the strength of your Eternal Universe, there is only one Divine General-level powerhouse, and it is also a Divine General level who has just been promoted, your Eternal Universe is too weak." Although we will still be suppressed when we enter the Eternal Universe now, we can exert ninety percent of our strength, which is more than enough to deal with you. Now, our Divine Dragon Divine General of the Xulong Holy Land has gone to stop the Lord of the Yuangu, even if you ask that person for help, he will not be able to save you. Once we occupy the territory of your Protoss, the luck of our Xulong Holy Land will soar, and the hope of our transcendence will be great. If you surrender, you can still become a peripheral force in our Xulong Holy Land, and you can continue to survive!"

"Impossible!"

The First Divine Lord roared.

He is the first god lord of the Protoss, the first strongest person in the universe in the past, and now let him take refuge in the Xulong Holy Land, and he is also a member of the peripheral forces, in order to bury the lives of countless people of the Protoss, in exchange for the opportunity to live, and it is to survive, he naturally will not do it.

"Wanfa Supreme, everything depends on you!"

The First Divine Lord secretly said.

Although his strength has now gone further, and he has barely stepped into the combat power of the Ten-Star Earth Venerable (in the future, he will be described by the Earth Venerable), but he is the weakest kind of Ten Star Earth Venerable, and he is far from being the opponent of the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable.

Before, he fought with the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable, and he was severely injured in just a few moves, and if he hadn't escaped into the God Realm in time, he would probably have fallen and died.

Moreover, this time, the Xulong Holy Land has sent three ten-star Earth Venerables!

In the Divine Realm, many Supremes were also flustered.

"First Divine Master, why don't we surrender, the strength of the Cangyu Universe is too strong, just one Xulong Holy Land is far superior to our Protoss, they also have God-level combat power, we are not opponents!"

"There is still hope!" the First Divine Lord said coldly: "Besides, if we really surrender, ninety percent of the Protoss will be exterminated, they will not allow our Protoss to have a large number of clansmen, maybe only us will be alive at that time, and do you dare to guarantee that they will not kill us in the future? The Ten Thousand Laws Supreme is about to arrive, and our Protoss still has a chance!"

"Is the Ten Thousand Law Supreme the opponent of the Xulong Holy Land?"

The Supreme of the Protoss remained skeptical.

They didn't know the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme, after all, they had never seen the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme make a move, but they felt that the Ten Thousand Laws Supreme Ye Tian's cultivation years were short, and no matter how he defied the sky, he only had the combat power of the Ten Star Earth Lord!

"Hmph, you don't know much about the Supreme of Ten Thousand Laws, I estimate that his strength is definitely not weaker than that of the Lord of the Ancient Ages!"

The First Divine Lord guessed.

Of course, this is just his speculation, he can only hope for Ye Tian now, naturally he has to exaggerate Ye Tian's strength and give hope to these Protoss Supremes, otherwise once these Protoss Supremes lose hope, maybe they will also be traitors and take the initiative to open the formation.

In that case, the Protoss will be completely finished.

Time passed little by little, and the powerhouses of the Xulong Holy Land such as the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable could not attack the God Realm.

Gradually, they also began to get irritable.

"The Divine Realm that the Protoss has spent hundreds of millions of years to build is indeed not simple, although it is not as good as the Holy Land Great Array of our Xulong Holy Land, but it is also enough to block the attacks of the Ten Ten Star Earth Venerables, if we want to break through the Great Divine Realm Array, I'm afraid it will take a lot of time!" muttered the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable.

"Earth Splitting Spear Venerable, we don't need to worry, the Eternal Universe is too weak, that Ancient Lord has been restrained by the Xulong God General, who else dares to be our enemy?

The one who opened his mouth was one of the three ten-star Earth Venerables on this trip - Silver Moon Sword Venerable!

In terms of strength, the Silver Moon Sword Venerable is not as good as the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable, but its strength is also at the top ten-star Earth Venerable level.

"Also, then we will attack slowly, the Great Array of the God Realm will eventually be shattered, and when the time comes, we will all destroy the Earth Venerables of the God Clan!" said the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable coldly.

Another moment passed.

At this moment, the First Divine Lord showed great joy: "The Ten Thousand Laws Supreme has arrived, and our God Clan has been saved!"

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian descended with constant light, standing outside the Divine Realm, his eyes staring at the people in the Xulong Holy Land.

And at this time, the Earth Splitting Spear Venerable discovered Ye Tian.

"The Earth Venerable of the Cangyu Universe!"

The Earth-Splitting Spear Venerable recognized it at a glance.

Although the two universes are now partially fused, the breath on the body is easy to identify, and the person who contains the breath of the eternal universe is naturally the living beings of the eternal universe, and it is very difficult for the strong people of the two universes to pretend, unless the two universes are completely integrated, then it is difficult to distinguish.

"Guan Ling, kill him!"

The Earth Splitting Spear Venerable instructed a Nine-Star Earth Venerable.

In his opinion, even if a Nine-Star Earth Venerable couldn't kill Ye Tian, it was enough to test Ye Tian's strength.

"Yes!"

Guan Ling responded and immediately made a move.

I saw that his whole person turned into a big world and bombarded Ye Tian, even if he didn't break through the previous First Divine Lord.

"Extinguish!"

Ye Tian flicked his fingers, and a ray of light of destruction instantly pierced through Guan Ling, killing it.

This scene completely shocked the powerhouses of the Xulong Holy Land, and the First Divine Lord was overjoyed when he saw this scene in the God Realm.
